OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Sam Maki.
Attorney, Margaret Dematteo is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mark Brock is present.
Attorney, Melissa E. Patterson is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.
This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of April 02, 2013 is vacated.
